CustomField.formula: IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Time",InvoicePOSTotalTimeCHF__c / FullCostsTotalTimeCHF__c , IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "Expense",InvoicePOSTotalExpenseCHF__c / CostsTotalExpenseCHF__c , IF( RecordType.DeveloperName = "SupplierCosts", InvoicePOSTotalSupplierCostsCHF__c / CostsTotalSupplierCostsCHF__c ,0)))
CustomField.label: Billing Rate - %
